release_gate.description: OPTIONAL CI-neutral release-gate authority requirement (off by default). When present, a required_for_release row whose only FRESH proof was minted with insufficient provenance authority is policy-blocked in RELEASE mode only; feature mode is never affected. The trust model is CI-NEUTRAL — only the proof's authority shape is inspected (see schemas/v1/authority.schema.json), not which provider produced it. Omitting this object, or leaving every field unset/falsy, preserves today's gating exactly.

required_authority.description: When "ci", a required row's matching FRESH proof must carry authority.type === "ci" (minted inside a recognised CI provider). A local-run proof (or no authority block) is insufficient and blocks release.

require_protected_ref.description: When true, a required row's matching FRESH proof must carry authority.protected_ref === true (the provider attested a protected branch). false/null/unknown is insufficient. protected_ref is provider-attested where available and otherwise unknown.
